ARGUMENTS well as lucky timing and favorable soci- etal conditions. Internalizing these lessons has led to a different kind of individualism. More people are letting go of society’s expectations and following their hearts when they can. As they recover from the toll of competition, they are bet- ter at recognizing it in others. The United States has built-in advantages over China in this regard: a more open culture, the English language, elite educational institutions, and a long history of integrating new- comers who then forge links between the United States and their home coun- tries.
